# Releases (AUTO GENERATED)

## Latest Releases

Stay up to date with the latest wwebjs releases, features, and improvements.

### Version 1.0.0 (Coming Soon)

The first stable release of wwebjs monorepo is coming soon with:

- **Core Package**: Fully rewritten core library with improved stability
- **TypeScript Support**: Complete type definitions
- **Multi-device**: Full support for WhatsApp multi-device
- **Documentation**: Comprehensive docs and guides
- **Examples**: Ready-to-use example projects

### Previous Versions

For the full changelog and release history, visit our [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/wwebjs/wwebjs/releases).

## Release Notes

Release notes include:

- New features and enhancements
- Bug fixes and improvements
- Breaking changes and migration guides
- Deprecation notices

## Staying Updated

- **GitHub**: Watch our repository for release notifications
- **Discord**: Join our community for release announcements
- **npm**: Follow [@wwebjs/core](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@wwebjs/core) on npm

## Versioning

wwebjs follows [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/):

- **Major** (x.0.0): Breaking changes
- **Minor** (0.x.0): New features, backwards compatible
- **Patch** (0.0.x): Bug fixes, backwards compatible
